title: WyrmRSS – a self-hosted RSS reader with inline YouTube
abstract:
I'm a software engineer and have been working on this for a couple of months, for fun, and thought I'd share it. If you try it, let me know, I'd be stoked!

I was inspired by a friend who wanted to escape the algorithms and had built a small, private reader for himself. He wasn'
